title: Hacker News
summary: One routed news reader implemented in both React-style TSX and TSRX over the same Octane data layer.

journeys.title: Browse distinct story feeds and follow story, comment, and user links
Show useful pending content before a delayed feed resolves
Keep the current page visible while delayed pagination resolves
Deliver styled server content and adopt it into an interactive client

faultScenarios.description: The fixture API delays feed responses so pending UI is observable.
Second-page item responses are delayed while the committed first page must remain usable.
